creator: jiufa@yahoo.com
text:
after booted up from floppy diskette and selected DOS partition as install media, I got "Error Mounting /dev/wd0s1 on dist: No such file or
directory(2)". I used files from stable to make boot diskette and downloaded all files from release using winftp. I have to hard drive in my machine. the one in which I put freebsd files(DOS partition) and freebsd partition located is in LBA mode.

How-To-Repeat: download freebsd distribution using winftp and put them in dos partition
(c:\FREEBSD),boot from floppy and select dos partition as install media.
